dashboard.label: Armis Collectors Product Listing and Aging View

search.query: | inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval creation_epoch=strptime('Creation Date (GMT -4)',"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort creation_epoch | head 1 | table Name, "Collector ID", "Creation Date (GMT -4)"

| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval creation_epoch=strptime('Creation Date (GMT -4)',"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort - creation_epoch | head 1 | table Name, "Collector ID", "Creation Date (GMT -4)"
| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval ntp_clean=trim('NTP Servers') | eval ntp_count=mvcount(split(ntp_clean,",")) | where ntp_count=1 AND ntp_clean="time.cloudflare.com" | stats count
| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | where isnull('NTP Servers') OR trim('NTP Servers')="" | stats count
| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval dns_clean=trim('DNS Servers') | eval dns_count=mvcount(split(dns_clean,",")) | where dns_count=1 AND dns_clean="8.8.8.8" | stats count
| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | stats count by Status | sort -count

| inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval creation_epoch=strptime('Creation Date (GMT -4)',"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval age_seconds = now() - creation_epoch
| eval years = floor(age_seconds/31536000) | eval months = floor((age_seconds % 31536000)/2592000) | eval weeks = floor((age_seconds % 2592000)/604800) | eval days = floor((age_seconds % 604800)/86400) | eval hours = floor((age_seconds % 86400)/3600) | eval minutes = floor((age_seconds % 3600)/60)
| eval Age = years." years, ". months." months, ". weeks." weeks, ". days." days, ". hours.":".minutes
| table "Collector ID", "Creation Date (GMT -4)", Age, "Last Seen (GMT -4)", "System Vendor", "Product Serial", "Name", "MAC Address", "IP Address", "Default Gateway", "Subnet", "NTP Servers", Status
| sort -creation_epoch
